race.comment: MISSILE DEFENCE (1) has been in career-best form this prep, winning 3 of his last 5 starts, including a soft win at Goulburn at long odds 9-days ago in this class. He rises an extra 2kg, but a repeat performance makes him hard to beat again. KING INCANTO (5) probably should have won his last start at Wangaratta 6 days ago, and with a clearer passage this time, he can go one better for a deserved win. NATIONAL ASSET (9) likes it wet, and was too tough for a BM50 field at Gundagai 15 days ago when scoring by a short head. There is more depth to this field, but he has the ability, and on a heavy track, he has to be respected again. BLACK ADAM (4) won a pair of trials prior to finishing less than 2 lengths from the winner in third place fresh up here nearly a month ago. He is just as sharp second up, and he is good enough to win this. ISCHYROS (3) is still building his fitness levels, and with another drop in class here, a form reversal is on the cards. Include.
